name: dropdown-menu-checkboxes
visual_summary: A dropdown menu containing checkbox options, useful for selecting multiple items. Developers can use it when users need to choose multiple options from a list, such as preferences or settings.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready dropdown component with the following characteristics:

Name: dropdown-menu-checkboxes
Description: A dropdown menu containing checkbox options, useful for selecting multiple items. Developers can use it when users need to choose multiple options from a list, such as preferences or settings.
Style: default
Interactions: clickable
Tags: dropdown, checkboxes, multiple-selection, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
